limitations: The 2020 official identity and planned connection do not prove the temporary passage's 2026 physical status, legal direction, or permitted exit movement.
release_blockers: OSM way 776884422 is officially identified as a 2020 land-readjustment temporary passage, but its 2026 physical status, legal direction, and permitted exit movement remain unconfirmed.
Source adjacency completeness does not establish complete legal successor coverage.

sources.supports: The pinned ODbL extract enumerates every motor-road successor at fourteen route and facility checkpoints.
The municipal opening notice identifies the third way's corridor as a temporary passage inside the land-readjustment area.

purpose: Prove that exact source adjacency and an official historic road identity cannot substitute for current legal direction, permitted movement, and production-layout review.

then.rationale: A historic official road identity does not establish the movement's current lawful state.
then.subject: route_atlas.status

then.rationale: The source-complete audit remains a candidate until current legal direction and exit movement are reviewed.
then.subject: route_atlas.error_codes

then.rationale: No official or raw source geometry becomes a released Kaido production schematic.

title: Historic K7 passage identity does not prove current legal movement
